response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems and performance-critical applications, but his primary expertise is in D, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Node.js rather than C++. His C++ experience is limited to early roles (e.g., National Instruments) and lacks recent or in-depth involvement with C++11/17/20, STL, or industrial automation frameworks. Additionally, his resume shows no direct experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), message brokers, or MQTT/REST integration for IoT, which are core requirements for this role. While he demonstrates strong problem-solving and collaboration skills, his technical alignment with the role is insufficient.
strengths: Strong background in performance-critical development (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang)
Experience with embedded systems and real-time applications (e.g., NI LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to mentor teams and improve development processes (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited recent or deep C++ experience (primarily D and JavaScript/TypeScript)
No demonstrated expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or message brokers
Lacks exposure to core industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
